name: ServiceNow
description: An enterprise workflow and ticketing platform used to manage service requests, approvals, incidents, and structured operational processes at scale.
whyUseIt: In complex portfolios, especially where property, workplace, IT, and facilities workflows overlap, ServiceNow can provide tighter control over intake, escalation, approvals, and audit trails than ad hoc email coordination.
aiCapabilities: AI can classify tickets, suggest routing, summarize incidents, and flag recurring problems that deserve process redesign rather than repeated manual handling.
workflowStage: Request management, incident routing, and controlled workflow execution
propertyManagerWorkflow: A property manager uses ServiceNow when workflows need stronger process control across multiple teams, especially for incidents, approvals, and high-volume request streams.
managerExpects: Correct categorization, SLA discipline, clear ownership, and an audit trail strong enough for governance and client review.
aiWorkflowImpact: AI reduces triage time and helps identify where many small tickets are actually signs of one deeper operating issue.
demoDescription: Review an incident queue, identify the items that need senior escalation, and rewrite the response flow to remove one avoidable handoff.

vocabulary.definition: A service disruption or issue that requires structured response and tracking.
The active list of requests or incidents waiting for action.
A missed response or resolution target against a service commitment.

beginnerMistakes: Using the wrong category and sending tickets into the wrong team
Closing incidents before confirming the business impact is resolved
Building too many process steps and slowing response unnecessarily
